title: The Milkman
writer: Albert Beich, James O'Hanlon, Martin Ragaway
actors: Donald O'Connor, Jimmy Durante, Piper Laurie
plot: Roger Bradley, son of a milk magnate, isn't allowed to work for his dad's company because of a lingering war trauma: in moments of stress he quacks like a duck. Desperate to escape from idleness, he gets a job with his father's ar...
